title: Delete Number in the dashboard
excerpt:
Hi Experts, 
For some reason, I do not need number inthe chart for posting to the public. 
I need only Top1 to Top15 for posing. 
How can I remove the number?  Can you support a simple chart? 
Rgds Kevin

posts.author: kevin_jun (kevin jun)
posts.cookedHtml:
image1822×780 32.1 KB

Hi Experts,
For some reason, I do not need number inthe chart for posting to the public.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Kevin! I am afraid it isn’t currently possible to remove this number. Great suggestion however - hopefully we can get the votes up to increase the potential for development

posts.author: kevin_jun (kevin jun)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks Bianca…
